promptTemplate:
Generate an elaborate collage featuring portraits of the following notable figures, in their most iconic styles and settings in a {{rows}} by {{cols}} grid, with {{saturation}} color saturation.
 The layout should be structured yet unexpected, and invoke feelings of curiosity and intrigue. Don't hesitate to use creative freedom to construct a piece of art that is unique and original; ultimately carving out an encapsulating visual journey through the myriad of personalities. 
Consider color balance, composition, and arrangement of images for a vibrant and intriguing visual narrative. Feel free to use artistic freedom for creativity and originality.

tags.label: Hollywood Squares Glif Workflow
tags.description: Converted from Eden/Glif p5+img2img pipeline. p5 code converted from global mode to Synthograsizer instance mode. variables[] and pseudorandom() calls replaced with p.getSynthVar() and p.random().
